svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron" agent="hbo-plugin"> <diagram name="HBO Plugin Architecture" id="hbo-arch-v3"> <mxGraphModel dx="-664" dy="-191" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1280" pageHeight="780" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=22;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#1565c0" value="HBO Plugin — Architecture" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="36" width="600" x="340" y="24" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="user" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e3f2fd;strokeColor=#1565c0;fontStyle=1;fontSize=14;arcSize=12" value="Operator" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="48" width="200" x="540" y="72" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="hermes" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e3f2fd;strokeColor=#1565c0;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;arcSize=12" value="Hermes Platform
Agent · Dashboard" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="360" x="460" y="152" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="plugin-box" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=36;fillColor=#fafafa;strokeColor=#1565c0;strokeWidth=2;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;fontColor=#1565c0;rounded=1;arcSize=4" value="HBO Plugin · plugin/hbo-plugin/" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="180" width="1120" x="80" y="248" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="core" parent="plugin-box" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e3f2fd;strokeColor=#1565c0;fontSize=12;arcSize=10" value="Plugin Core

Tools · Rules · State" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="88" width="230" x="30" y="56" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="dashboard" parent="plugin-box" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=12;arcSize=10" value="Dashboard

React UI · FastAPI" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="88" width="230" x="300" y="56" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bridge" parent="plugin-box" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff3e0;strokeColor=#e65100;fontSize=12;arcSize=10" value="Tool Bridge

composio-cli skill" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="88" width="230" x="570" y="56" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="profiles" parent="plugin-box" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f3e5f5;strokeColor=#6a1b9a;fontSize=12;arcSize=10" value="Profiles

Sales Ops · Growth · Ops Lead" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="88" width="230" x="840" y="56" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="data" parent="1" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;boundedLbl=1;backgroundOutline=1;size=14;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#2e7d32;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12" value="Local State
JSON files" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="72" width="200" x="260" y="500" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="external" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff3e0;strokeColor=#e65100;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;arcSize=10" value="External Apps
Gmail · Slack · CRM · …" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="240" x="820" y="508" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="subtitle" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;fontSize=11;fontStyle=2;fontColor=#666666" value="Demo uses local JSON · Production operations integrate with real external apps via Composio" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="24" width="800" x="240" y="620" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" edge="1" parent="1" source="user" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;endArrow=blockThin;endFill=1;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#1565c0;" target="hermes"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2" edge="1" parent="1" source="hermes" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;endArrow=blockThin;endFill=1;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#1565c0;" target="dashboard"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e-dash-core" edge="1" parent="1" source="dashboard" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;endArrow=blockThin;endFill=1;strokeWidth=1;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=10;" target="core" value="API"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e3" edge="1" parent="1" source="core" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;endArrow=blockThin;endFill=1;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#2e7d32;fontSize=10;" target="data" value="read / write"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e5" edge="1" parent="1" source="core" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;endArrow=blockThin;endFill=1;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#e65100;" target="bridge"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e4" edge="1" parent="1" source="bridge" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;endArrow=blockThin;endFill=1;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#e65100;fontSize=10;" target="external" value="execute"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e6" edge="1" parent="1" source="profiles" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;endArrow=open;endFill=0;strokeWidth=1;strokeColor=#6a1b9a;fontSize=10;" target="hermes" value="profile install"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="1075" y="318" /> <mxPoint x="1180" y="318" /> <mxPoint x="1180" y="180" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
